resources.name: Sunshard Infusion Slots
resources.description: Slots for attaching a Sunshard Infusion (Overcharge / Solar Shield / Arcane Brilliance / Cutting Edge) to a synthesized Sunshard. Improved Infusions (level 9) adds Intelligence modifier to the pool.

resources.name: Dumb Luck
resources.description: Reaction uses to reduce incoming damage by 1d6 + Charisma modifier. Last use of the day imposes disadvantage on your next d20 Test.

resources.name: Runes
resources.description: Runes you can inscribe per long rest (Escape / Accuracy / Resilience / Absorption / Warding / Impact / Rune of Destruction).

note: Fiendish Mutation/Armor of Fiends spend the existing monk Focus Point pool (already tracked via the generic character data.energy counter, not character_resources) -- new spend options only, no new resource. See ticket C8 context.

resources.name: Ghost Shroud
resources.description: Reaction uses (+Wisdom modifier to AC, or reroll a failed save) at 1 + Wisdom modifier. Players Guide says "per day"; TLC has no standalone day-tracking (session-based leveling/rests, design-doc-digest.md), so this maps to session cadence rather than long rest.

resources.name: Lucky Number
resources.description: A d20 rolled by hand and stored after each long rest; rolling that number on a weapon attack is a critical hit (a natural 20 triples damage dice).

resources.name: Hedge Your Bets
resources.description: Uses per short rest for Side Bet / Split Bet / Sure Bet.

note: Withered Might spends Hit Dice for sorcery points with an unscoped 'uses scale 1->5' ramp (players-guide-digest.md L105) -- but the digest's own curated Section 9 list ('Subclass resource pools (all need counters)', L51-57) does not include Mirage, so no counter is authored here. If a future ticket adds one, resolve the scaling ambiguity against the source PDF first.

resources.name: Divine Code Points
resources.description: Manipulate the Code options: Diagnostic Recalibration / Override Safeguards / Entropy Optimization / Threat Interdiction (1 point each); also 1/long rest free re-cast of an already-cast action spell for points equal to its level.
